commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: increase default OST BRW size to 4MB
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: increase default OST BRW size to 4MB

This is for test only.

Change-Id: I45d9cf35196f041eb3710aadc0c59e0f7001a0b5
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
